title: keteleeria davidiana subsp. pubescens
intro: Keteleeria davidiana subsp. pubescens, also known as the pubescent David's fir, is a plant species within the pine family native to China and Korea. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Keteleeria davidiana subsp. pubescens include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infused in water to be consumed, with some herbal preparations also using it in combination with other medicinal plants to enhance its effects.
